metadata.title: Partnership — Remix
metadata.description: Integrate with Remix, co-market to Web3 developers, or sponsor the most-used Ethereum IDE.

hero.description: Remix is used by millions of developers every month. Partner with us to integrate your tooling, amplify your reach, or fund the open source infrastructure that powers Ethereum.

featured.name: Your Tool
featured.description: Connect your protocol directly inside Remix and reach every developer in the ecosystem.

types.title: Technical Integration
types.description: Build a Remix plugin or native integration. Connect your protocol, RPC provider, indexer, or dev tool directly into Remix's interface and reach millions of developers.

types.title: Co-Marketing
types.description: Reach the Web3 developer community through Remix's channels. Joint blog posts, social campaigns, hackathon sponsorships, and newsletter features.

types.title: Sponsor Development
types.description: Support specific feature development, infrastructure, or educational content. Named sponsorship with visibility across the platform and community channels.

openSourceSection.description: Join our community of builders collaborating to shape the future of Web3.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Tell us about your project and what kind of partnership you have in mind. We respond to serious enquiries within 3–5 business days.
